name: python3-django-crispy-forms
title: python3-django-crispy-forms
summary: app for Django providing elegant form rendering (Python3 version)
description:
app for Django providing elegant form rendering (Python3 version)
django-crispy-forms provides you with a |crispy filter and {% crispy %} tag
that will let you control the rendering behavior of your Django forms in a
very elegant and DRY way. Have full control without writing custom form
templates. All this without breaking the standard way of doing things in
Django, so it plays nice with any other form application.
.
Django-crispy-forms supports several frontend frameworks, such as Twitter
Bootstrap (versions 2, 3 and 4), Uni-form and Foundation. You can also easily
adapt your custom company's one, creating your own, see the docs for more
information. You can easily switch among them using CRISPY_TEMPLATE_PACK
setting variable.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-django-crispy-forms because app for Django providing elegant form rendering (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-django-crispy-forms as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-django-crispy-forms with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-django-crispy-forms --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
